title: Bipolar & Lithium Mastery
content:
• Dx: Manic Episode: Sleeping little (>8 days), pressured speech.
• Risk: Lithium Toxicity: Precipitated by Advil (NSAIDs). Use Aspirin instead.

title: APGAR Score & Birth Injuries
content:
• Dx: APGAR at 1m (tolerance) & 5m (resuscitation). Does NOT predict neuro outcome.
• Dx: Erb-Duchenne (C5-C6): Medially rotated arm (Waiters tip).

title: Informed Consent & Refusal
content:
• Rule: Confirm capacity before respecting refusal.
• Risk: Adult Refusal: Do not override a capable adult even if life-saving.
